text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black goes to the racecourse to observe
her rivals in the Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the top of her list of rivals is Brusquement, who
is under the Empress Air Groove's tutelage and
has been dominating her races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Reporters swarm Brusquement now that she has
been identified as the favorite to win the Classic
Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Kitasan Black looks on, she becomes painfully
aware of the gap between them.
